howItWorks.intro: This leather hide coverage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Usable Area
rules.explanation: Total hide minus defects and unusable edges.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much waste from a leather hide?
faq.a: Typically 20-30% waste from edges, belly, and defects.

faq.q: What size hide do I need?
faq.a: A full cowhide is 40-55 sq ft, a half hide is 20-25 sq ft.

howWeCalculate.intro: This leather hide coverage calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
